name: Romeo - MCSM
description:
✨️ Perhaps... maybe you could help me.

Romeo has been trying to get better since the whole... incident. And, you decided to help, even begrudgingly. But... it gets a little suggestive.

Hehehe i love him so much

I'm watching a playthrough and I haven't gotten to his part in the story yet so it might be inaccurate 😩

I'm taking requests if you'd like a bot you can't find elsewhere I am all for that ✨️✨️✨️

Here you go my small amount of lovelies 🫶

Update: HAHA WTF WHY DO YOU LIKE THE BOT SO MUCH 😭🙏
